# PROACTIVE_PROPOSAL_QUEUE_TEMPLATE.md

> **Status:** Governance v7 reference. Locked Founder ratification 2026-05-12.
> **Purpose:** Paste-ready template for weekly proactive proposal queue. Used by parbaughs-proactive-proposal skill to generate `.claude/state/proactive-proposals/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md` files.

---

## Queue file structure

```markdown
# Proactive Proposal Queue — {YYYY-MM-DD}

**Generated by:** Proactive cycle (weekly)
**Cycle ID:** proactive-{YYYYMMDD}-{HHMM}
**Cycle duration:** {Nm}
**Cycle tokens consumed:** {Nk}

**Review deadline:** {date + 14 days} (proposals auto-flag stale after this)

---

## Summary

- Total proposals: {N}
- Lane 1 (UI Polish): {N}
- Lane 2 (Bug Discovery): {N}
- Lane 3 (Performance): {N}
- Lane 4 (Design System): {N}

**Estimated implementation cost if all accepted:** ~{N} hours / ~{N}k tokens

**Risk distribution:**
- Low: {N}
- Medium: {N}
- High: {0} (high-risk gets FIQ entry instead)

**Critic pre-review:** All proposals passed quality bar. {N} initially proposed but rejected at quality bar (logged in cycle history).

---

## Lane 1 — UI Polish

### PROP-001 — {short title}

**Surface:** {file/section reference, e.g. "3h Settings § 3h.1.4 Account section"}

**Observation:**
{Concrete description of what was found. Include screenshot reference, code snippet, or specific element.}

**Detection method:**
{How agent found this. E.g. "Cross-ship audit identified inconsistent button heights" or "Lighthouse a11y scan failed on color contrast" or "Visual diff between 3h and 3o pages revealed spacing inconsistency."}

**Proposed action:**
{Concrete fix. Include design system citation (which token/principle this aligns with).}

**Estimated cost:** {time + tokens}

**Risk:** {Low | Medium | High} — {1-sentence rationale}

**Reversibility:** {Trivial | Moderate | Expensive} — {1-sentence note}

**Justification:**
{Why this is worth doing. 1-2 sentences.}

**Critic pre-review:** PASSED at quality bar on {date}. Notes: {any}

**Founder decision:** _Accept / Reject / Defer_
**Founder note:** _{paste reasoning here}_
**Decision date:** _{YYYY-MM-DD}_

---

### PROP-002 — {short title}

[... same structure ...]

---

## Lane 2 — Bug Discovery

### PROP-005 — {short title}

**Detection:**
{Evidence. Include data: logs, benchmark results, failed test scenarios, dependency audit output.}

**Reproducer:** {steps if available, "no reproducer — pattern from logs" if not}

**Severity:** {Critical | High | Medium | Low} — {1-sentence rationale}

**Surface affected:** {component, page, or system area}

**Hypothesized cause:**
{Best current hypothesis. Explicitly labeled as hypothesis if not confirmed.}

**Confirmed vs hypothesis:**
- Confirmed: {bullet points of what's verified with evidence}
- Hypothesis: {bullet points of what's hypothesized but unverified}

**Proposed investigation cost:**
{Time + tokens for spike}

**Risk if unaddressed:**
{Impact if bug stays}

**Critic pre-review:** PASSED at quality bar on {date}. Notes: {any}

**Founder decision:** _Accept / Reject / Defer_
**Founder note:** _{paste reasoning here}_
**Decision date:** _{YYYY-MM-DD}_

---

## Lane 3 — Performance

### PROP-008 — {short title}

**Detection method:**
{Benchmark / bundle analyzer / profiler / etc.}

**Baseline measurement:**
{Specific number with methodology. E.g. "Honors course leaderboard renders in 380ms (p50, measured across 100 page loads on Chrome desktop)."}

**Projected improvement:**
{Specific number with methodology. E.g. "Memoizing leaderboard computation projected to reduce render to 120ms (p50)."}

**Implementation approach:**
{Concrete code-level approach, not vague intent.}

**Fault tolerance:**
{What could go wrong? How would we detect? How would we revert?}

**Estimated cost:** {time + tokens}

**Risk:** {Low | Medium | High} — {1-sentence rationale}

**Reversibility:** {Trivial | Moderate | Expensive}

**Critic pre-review:** PASSED at quality bar on {date}. Notes: {any}

**Founder decision:** _Accept / Reject / Defer_
**Founder note:** _{paste reasoning here}_
**Decision date:** _{YYYY-MM-DD}_

---

## Lane 4 — Design System Extension

### PROP-011 — {short title}

**Usage analysis:**
{Count of repetitions across codebase. Where they appear.}

**Proposed addition:**
{New token / utility class / primitive component name + definition}

**Design system integration plan:**
{How this fits into existing design system. Citations to relevant sections.}

**Migration cost for existing usages:**
{Time + tokens to update existing code to use new abstraction}

**Justification:**
{Why this consolidation is worth the migration cost.}

**Critic pre-review:** PASSED at quality bar on {date}. Notes: {any}

**Founder decision:** _Accept / Reject / Defer_
**Founder note:** _{paste reasoning here}_
**Decision date:** _{YYYY-MM-DD}_

---

## Implementation tracking

Once Founder approves, this table tracks implementation status:

| Proposal ID | Founder decision | Decision date | Implemented at | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PROP-001 | _pending_ | — | — | — |
| PROP-002 | _pending_ | — | — | — |
| ... | | | | |

---

## Auto-resurfaced from past defer

If any proposals were deferred 4+ weeks ago and have re-surfaced this cycle:

### PROP-XXX (originally proposed {date}, deferred {date})

[... same structure, with note about defer history ...]

---

## Cycle metadata

- **Cycle ID:** proactive-{YYYYMMDD}-{HHMM}
- **Generated by agents:** {list}
- **Quality bar rejections:** {N} (logged in critic-audit-log.json)
- **Founder review target deadline:** {date + 14 days}
- **Auto-stale flag at:** {date + 14 days}

---

*Template authored 2026-05-12. Used by parbaughs-proactive-proposal skill.*
